chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يَجِبُ مُصَادَقَتُهُ وَ مُصَاحَبَتُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The one whose friendship and companionship is Obligated

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/531)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/531)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَا صَالِحُ اتَّبِعْ مَنْ يُبْكِيكَ وَ هُوَ لَكَ نَاصِحٌ وَ لَا تَتَّبِعْ مَنْ يُضْحِكُكَ وَ هُوَ لَكَ غَاشٌّ وَ سَتَرِدُونَ عَلَى اللَّهِ جَمِيعاً فَتَعْلَمُونَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Najran, from Muhammad Bin Al Salt, from Aban, from Abu Al Udays who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Salih! Follow the one makes you cry and he is an adviser to you, and do not follow the one who makes you laugh and he is a swindler to you, and all of you would be returning to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and will find out’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu Najran from Muhammad ibn al-Salt from Aban from abu al-’Udays who has said the following: “O Salih, follow the one who makes you cry while providing good advice and do not follow the one who makes you laugh but is cheating. You will all return to Allah and will find out.”
